programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman's dog was viciously attacked by a pit bull and eventually died. She's now left with medical bills and emotionally distraught. She hopes to seek justice for her pet and is suing the defendant.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman lends her BFF $4,800 in order to keep a failing juice bar buoyant. Now that sales are up the plaintiff would like to be reimbursed. But the defendant insists that the money was an investment a.

programme.desc: Breach of contract and damages bring litigants to court. A promoter claims he booked a space for an event only to find out that the venue wasn't available. But the defendant insists that the plaintiff.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: Terry operates on a cancer survivor whose gynaecologist did her tummy tuck.

programme.title: Below Deck Down Under
programme.desc: Tensions boil over when a crew member stirs chaos among the team. Their behavior tests loyalties and patience.

programme.desc: Jen returns from pre-trial meetings in New York with unexpected news. Heather hosts a ski day to reunite the women, but tempers flare when Lisa discovers Angie H. is invited. Whitney attempts to resol.

programme.desc: While Aubrey reacts to shocking news, Sophia is forced to examine the reasons she's holding on to her toxic ex-boyfriend. Kathy weighs the possible risks of removing her breast implants and if she's r.

programme.sub-title: The Truth Will Set You Off

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Kyle and Dorit surprise Teddi with a baby shower, but Brandi reveals a few surprises of her own. Denise and Garcelle lament over how they think Lisa has changed.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A woman purchased a truck she found online from the defendant. She discovered several months after the sale that the truck was stolen. However, the defendant insists that he owned the vehicle for 10 years.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Guests include Adam Brody, Gaten Matarazzo, Mark Messier and musical guest Courtney Barnett.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Denise is a no-show at Dorit's housewarming party and fails to keep plans with Garcelle twice in one week. The group hops on a private jet to celebrate Erika's Broadway debut.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: Newly single Josh Flagg plays mentor to a teenage buyer with an eight million dollar budget. Meanwhile, Josh Altman's domination of the Bird Streets continues.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Botched
programme.desc: Danielle Milian visits the doctors to fix her scarred stomach and popped implant, while a police officer wants her pig nose gone so she can look like her twin again.

programme.title: Death Row Confidential
programme.desc: Retired Detective Ken Mains and inmate Bill Noguera uncover chilling new details about serial killer Joseph Nasowho posed as a pro baseball team's photographer to hunt women and may have gone on a kil.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When police discover two murdered lovers in East Harlem, a stolen phone leads them on a journey into the heart of a criminal underground.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A concerned father in Arkansas reports his son missing, launching an investigation that would unearth a dark network of lies and a horrific discovery more deadly than police ever imagined.

programme.title: Fatal Family Feuds
programme.desc: When a young mother, her daughter and a friend vanish after a visit with extended family, those close to the victims suspect foul play.

programme.desc: Danielle Milian visits the doctors to fix her scarred stomach and popped implant, while a police officer wants her pig nose gone so she can look like her twin again.
